creator: lifanov@freebsd.org
text:
Yes, these were built from the same revision:

$ diff -u <(ident libc.so.7.bfd) <(ident libc.so.7.lld)
--- /tmp//sh-np.v0yaqh	2017-07-19 14:50:00.866753000 -0400
+++ /tmp//sh-np.OfqXT7	2017-07-19 14:50:00.896432000 -0400
@@ -1,4 +1,4 @@
-libc.so.7.bfd:
+libc.so.7.lld:
      $FreeBSD: head/lib/csu/i386/crti.S 217105 2011-01-07 16:07:51Z kib $
      $FreeBSD: head/lib/libc/string/wmemmove.c 188080 2009-02-03 17:58:20Z danger $
      $FreeBSD: head/lib/libc/string/wmemcmp.c 188080 2009-02-03 17:58:20Z danger $
